notes: Specialized surface miners for sites dominated by water ice, carbon volatiles, or nitrogen volatiles.
miner_type: cryovolatile — deployment requires that more than 50% of site resource mass fraction is water_ice, carbon_volatiles, or nitrogen_volatiles combined.
Uses thermal or laser drilling and sublimation capture to extract ices efficiently.
mining_rate_kg_per_hr describes bulk ice/volatile throughput under full-concentration conditions.
Effective rate scales with resource mass_fraction as normal.
Multiple units may be run concurrently; rates sum.
Draws electric_mw from ship or surface power bus during active operations.
